summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Monarch Blue Chips Elite Index ETF (MBCE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Monarch Blue Chips Elite index. The fund tracks a high conviction equal-weighted index of companies selected from the S&P 500 Index that are perceived to be fundamentally sound. MBCE was launched on Mar 23, 2021 and is issued by Monarch.
